root_cause: A NetworkPolicy blocks required dependency egress, and probe failures follow because the health check depends on that blocked upstream
evidence: NetworkPolicy selection for this pod includes egress isolation via allow-cluster-dns, default-deny-egress
Timeline shows dependency connectivity failures before readiness probe failures for container 'api'
Observed 2 effective policy-backed dependency -> probe failure occurrence(s) within the recent incident window
Container 'api' is currently ready=False, restartCount=0, state=running
Dependency service 'postgres' still has ready endpoints, which points to pod egress isolation rather than a backend outage

causes.message: An egress-isolating NetworkPolicy selects this pod, so outbound traffic is limited to explicitly allowed destinations
Effective NetworkPolicy egress rules do not allow required traffic to 'postgres.default.svc.cluster.local:5432'
The readiness health check depends on upstream dependency reachability, so policy-blocked egress propagates into probe failure
Readiness probe failures begin only after dependency connectivity failures appear on the same container

pod:orders-api-6b5d7d8c96-zr8lf: Readiness probe failures are downstream of policy-blocked dependency traffic
networkpolicy:allow-cluster-dns: This policy selects the pod for egress isolation and does not effectively allow the required dependency traffic
container:api: Error: failed to connect to postgres.default.svc.cluster.local:5432: dial tcp 10.96.42.17:5432: i/o timeout
Readiness probe failed: GET /readyz returned 503 because dependency postgres.default.svc.cluster.local:5432 timed out
service:postgres: The backing Service still has ready endpoints during the probe failure sequence

likely_causes: The pod is selected by a deny-all or overly narrow egress NetworkPolicy that does not allow required dependency traffic
The readiness endpoint is coupled to dependency reachability instead of local container health
Backend services are healthy, but only this pod cannot reach them because policy enforcement isolates its outbound traffic
suggested_checks: Review the effective union of egress rules for this pod and verify the dependency destination and port are explicitly allowed
Exec into a debug pod with the same labels or policy selection and test connectivity to the dependency target
